en: And if it is, why is a giraffe wearing a top hat?
ko: 만약 그렇다면, 왜 기린이 탑햇을 쓰고 있죠?

en: Don't ask me, man. Go ask a giraffe. Coach. Yeah. Marcus.
ko: 나한테 묻지 마, 친구. 기린한테 물어봐. 코치. 그래, 마커스.

en: Marcus Adebayo, The Independent. Woo! Woo! Grads on the new gig. Thank you.
ko: 마커스 아데바요, 인디펜던트. 우와! 새로운 일 축하해. 고마워.

en: What do you got for me?
Do you have any response to the comments made earlier today by your former assistant coach, Nathan Shelley?
ko: 오늘 당신의 전 보조 코치인 네이선 셸리의 발언에 대한 반응이 있나요?

en: Uh, yes, I do. Yeah. I thought it was hilarious. I mean, he came and got us, didn't he? No
ko: 어, 네, 있어. 정말 웃겼어. 그가 우리를 데리러 왔잖아?

en: Hey, but that's Nate the Great for you.
ko: 하지만 그게 바로 네이트 더 그레이트야.

en: You know, he's the same way
on the pitch. You know, he'll find the tiniest little weakness in a team and just want to
ko: 팀의 가장 작은 약점을 찾아서 공격하고 싶어 해.

en: attack that. Yeah. I mean, he's a junkyard dog, man. And smart. They're real lucky to
ko: 그걸 공격해. 그래. 그는 정말 쓰레기장 개 같아, 친구. 그리고 똑똑해.

en: have him over there at West Ham.
I wish him the best of luck.
I guess I'm a little surprised
that's all he could come up with.
